trigger: LLM generated mock patches using bare module-level paths instead of patching where the symbol is used
symptom: Mocks have no effect — patched object is the original at call site; tests pass or fail for wrong reasons
notes: LLMs consistently patch the source module instead of the import alias in the module under test. The canonical rule: mock where the name is looked up, not where it is defined. See unittest.mock docs: 'patch where it is used'.
